summary: CRITICAL FAILURE: Invoke-ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 is missing—workflow references it but file doesn't exist, causing immediate failure. Actions not pinned to SHA (security). Duplication: test job runs Pester twice (lines ~30-32, ~35-40). run-act-tests.ps1 doesn't meet spec: needs multiple test cases with fixture data + exact output validation, but only runs act once with weak string matching. No Set-StrictMode in scripts. Validate job hard-codes tests instead of using fixtures. No permissions defined. Missing actionlint validation step. Output capture to act-result.txt incomplete. Not production-ready.
